description: Conservative repository guardrails for Codex sessions. Hooks only inspect, warn, or block; they do not modify source files.

session_start.name: inject-current-status-context
session_start.message: Read AGENTS.md, Codex.md, docs/00_PROJECT_CURRENT_STATUS.md, and docs/PROJECT_STATUS_EVIDENCE.md before substantial work. Current trained scope is binary Benign vs DoS_DDoS. Preserve frontend -> backend -> ml-service.

pre_command.name: block-clearly-destructive-commands
pre_command.message: Destructive commands require explicit user approval and a checked target.

pre_write.name: block-protected-model-artifact-writes
pre_write.message: Protected model, metadata, or explanation artifact path. Do not modify without explicit permission.

pre_write.name: block-protected-dataset-and-screenshot-writes
pre_write.message: Protected official dataset/export or screenshot path. Do not modify without explicit permission.

post_write.name: warn-frontend-direct-ml-calls
post_write.message: Frontend must call backend only; backend calls ML service.

post_write.name: remind-no-silent-mock-fallback
post_write.message: Mock/demo data must be explicit and must not hide failed real pipeline calls.

post_command.name: identify-failed-validation-command
post_command.nonzero_message: Validation command failed. Report the command and do not conceal failure with mock or demo fallback.
